raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags two substantive issues with the original text, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.6": "The revised text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "The agent does not mark confidence for each recommendation, only flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims in the notes section.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., unclear variance reporting).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason, only a general note on changes made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags two substantive issues with the original text, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.6: The revised text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not mark confidence for each recommendation, only flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims in the notes section.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., unclear variance reporting).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason, only a general note on changes made.
